candidate_definitions.text: This repository contains code for extending the Stanford Alpaca synthetic instruction tuning to existing instruction-tuned models such as Flan-T5.

📣 We developed Flacuna by fine-tuning Vicuna-13B on the Flan collection. Flacuna is better than Vicuna at problem-solving. Access the model here [https://huggingface.co/declare-lab/flacuna-13b-v1.0](https://huggingface.co/declare-lab/flacuna-13b-v1.0).

Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.

candidate_glosses.text: 📣 We developed Flacuna by fine-tuning Vicuna-13B on the Flan collection. Flacuna is better than Vicuna at problem-solving. Access the model here [https://huggingface.co/declare-lab/flacuna-13b-v1.0](https://huggingface.co/declare-lab/flacuna-13b-v1.0).
